caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario taking place in a hospital setting, likely during a training exercise referred to as "Sim Week." A group of healthcare professionals, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing masks and gloves, are gathered around a patient lying on a bed. One individual is holding a resuscitation bag, suggesting they are performing or preparing to perform CPR or another life-saving procedure. Another person is adjusting an IV stand, while others observe and assist. The environment is equipped with various medical supplies and equipment, indicating a well-prepared and realistic training environment. The scene conveys a sense of urgency and teamwork as the participants work together to address the simulated medical emergency.
